title: sideritis arborescens var. maura
intro: Sideritis arborescens var. maura, also known as Greek mountain tea, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Greece and other parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of stress, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Greek mountain tea include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage, as well as supporting immune system function and overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal supplements and capsules, making it a popular natural remedy among those seeking alternative health solutions.
